svg.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, 'Courier New', 'Malgun Gothic', monospace
svg.title: Tech stack - probe bank
svg.desc: An oscilloscope probe bank where each technology is a channel with a mini signal: Python and PyTorch as EMG-style bursts, Go as a square wave, Svelte and TypeScript as a smooth sine, OpenVINO NPU as an INT8 quantization staircase, and SCSS web as a soft sine.
